title: The Cold Case of the Missing Heiress

scenes.text: A wealthy heiress vanished, leaving behind only questions and rumors.
It happened in Newport, at a lavish estate.
In 1940, heiress Helen Wills disappeared from her home without a trace.
The estate remains a reminder of a mystery that lasted decades.
Despite extensive searches, Helen has never been found.
scenes.label: NEVER FOUND

scenes.text: Follow for daily true crime mysteries.

description: 📍 Newport, USA - 1940. Heiress Helen Wills vanished from her estate, and the case remains unsolved. Follow for daily cold cases!
